allow: PowerShell(cd "E:\\Claude Code\\kids-scheduler"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/schedule" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) | Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "Request failed: $_" } finally { $proc.Kill\(\) })
